message:
fix(witness): fix ParseSwarmStart docstring, double TrimPrefix, and missing BeadIDs parsing

The docstring claimed JSON body format but the parser uses line-based key:value.
Updated docstring to match reality. Replaced confusing nested TrimPrefix with
separate branches. Added Beads field parsing to populate BeadIDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
